University: Fatima Jinnah Women University (Rawalpindi), City: Rawalpindi. Management: Online portals simplify registration and fee payments; scholarship info is clear. Students report slow responses from some administrative offices during peak periods. Suggested improvements include clearer scheduling and enhanced faculty-student mentorship. Several faculty members publish regularly.
University: NUML, City: Islamabad. Sports: Active student clubs organize inter-department tournaments and fitness sessions. Facilities are small for growing interest, with limited coaching staff.
